name: Physiomart
description: Physiomart is a prominent supplier of high-quality physiotherapy equipment and supplies, offering a wide range of products such as Tens units, electrodes, kinesiology tapes, exercise bands, and balance boards. They provide convenient online ordering and delivery, making it easy for healthcare professionals to access essential physio supplies.

name: HMS Medical Systems
description: HMS Medical Systems is a leading manufacturer and exporter of physiotherapy equipment, providing a diverse range of high-quality products such as ultrasound therapy machines, TENS units, and muscle stimulators. With over 24 years of experience and ISO certification, the company ensures that its innovative equipment meets international standards for performance and durability, making it a trusted choice for physiotherapy practitioners worldwide.

name: GUANGZHOU LONGEST SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD
description: GUANGZHOU LONGEST SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD is a specialized manufacturer of physiotherapy and rehabilitation equipment, offering a wide range of products such as electrotherapy and cryotherapy systems designed to enhance recovery and manage pain. With over twenty years of experience and adherence to international quality standards, LONGEST is committed to providing innovative solutions that improve patient health and rehabilitation outcomes.

name: pt Health
description: pt Health is a service provider that specializes in physiotherapy along with a comprehensive range of other rehabilitation and wellness services. They emphasize high-quality, patient-centered care and offer innovative solutions, including Virtual Care options for enhanced accessibility to physiotherapy services.

name: Physio Plus Tech
description: Physio Plus Tech specializes in cloud-based Health-IT solutions for physiotherapy, offering practice management software and digital tools that enhance the operational efficiency of physiotherapy clinics. Their services include Telehealth capabilities and automated documentation, empowering physiotherapists to effectively manage patient records and streamline clinic operations.

name: Gymna Uniphy
description: Gymna specializes in medical equipment and supplies that enhance physiotherapy treatments, offering a diverse range of products including treatment tables, electrotherapy devices, shockwave therapy equipment, and more. With over 50 years of experience, Gymna is dedicated to providing innovative solutions that meet the evolving needs of the healthcare community.

name: Physiquipe
description: Physiquipe specializes in advanced technological equipment for physical assessment and rehabilitation, offering products like the BTE PrimusRS and BTE MCU Neck Assessment systems, which are essential for physiotherapy practices. Their commitment to innovation and education ensures that clients have access to cutting-edge tools and training to enhance rehabilitation outcomes.

name: Patterson Medical
description: Performance Health is a prominent global manufacturer of medical devices, specializing in a wide range of rehabilitation and recovery products, which includes various physiotherapy equipment such as treatment tables and exercise gear. With over 70 years of experience, the company is dedicated to providing innovative solutions that enhance the quality of life for individuals in need of physical therapy and rehabilitation.

name: THAAHA MEDICAL EQUIPMENT DUBAI
description: The company offers a comprehensive range of physiotherapy equipment, including anti-gravity treadmills, muscle stimulators, and ultrasound therapy devices, ensuring access to the latest advancements in medical technology. Their commitment to professional installation and support enhances the overall service experience for healthcare providers.

name: Balanced Body
description: Balanced Body specializes in innovative Pilates equipment, notably the CoreAlign system, which enhances musculoskeletal rehabilitation by targeting core stabilizing muscles. This equipment is effective for both rehabilitation and conditioning, making it a valuable resource for fitness centers and rehabilitation facilities.
